title: Cosplay Outfit Catalog Workflow AI
sourceTitle: Cosplay Outfit Catalog Workflow AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Static outfit catalog frame for an original adult anime-style cosplay character, 9:16 vertical. On the right side: an adult original anime-style woman, 24, confident playful expression, looking at camera and pointing upward as if presenting the title area. She wears a non-revealing starlight ranger costume: navy cropped jacket over full opaque top, silver belt, opaque leggings, boots, gloves, and a small cape. On the left side: a stable flat black-bordered catalog panel with neat product boxes showing item cutouts and simple readable labels: jacket 1x, belt 1x, boots 1x, cape 1x, gloves 1x. White photography studio background, clean product-catalog layout, front-facing flat panel, no camera distortion, crisp anime merch presentation, title-ready empty space above. Adult only, no copied character, no brand logo, no random text, no watermark. adult character: adult original anime-style woman, 24, confident playful expression, pointing upward. outfit theme: starlight ranger costume with navy cropped jacket, silver belt, opaque leggings, boots, small cape. product grid: left-side flat catalog grid: jacket 1x, belt 1x, boots 1x, cape 1x, gloves 1x. composition: white studio background, character on right, stable black-bordered catalog panel on left.
